name: TRW Inc.
description: TRW Inc., originally known as Thompson Ramo Wooldridge Inc., was a prominent American corporation that operated as a diversified conglomerate. The company was heavily involved in the aerospace, electronics, automotive, and credit reporting industries. It played a critical role in the development of American missile systems and spacecraft, while also becoming one of the world's leading manufacturers of automotive components, such as airbag systems. Following a long history of innovation and industrial growth, TRW Inc. was acquired by Northrop Grumman in 2002, effectively ending its existence as an independent entity.
